SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2004 - JUDGMENT ORDERED AND SIGNED IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT MR. WHARTON BROWN, JR. AND AGAINST APPELLANT MR. CANDO MARTINEZ IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,960.26 PRINCIPAL; $52.00 COSTS; $52.27 INTEREST; TOTAL JUDGMENT: $2,064.53. JUDGE: JUDGE PRO TEM RICHARD ALLAN HORNING; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D525, WED., 06-OCT-04).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BROWN JR., WHARTON RECOVER FROM APPELLANT MARTINEZ, CANDO $1,960.26 PRINCIPAL, $52.27 INTEREST, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,064.53, SEE SCANNED DOC
